task_completion.description: Open the GCompris Vector Drawing activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is open and the Vector Drawing activity (showing a blank canvas and drawing tools) is active.

task_completion.description: Draw a square or rectangular house body
task_completion.visual_evidence: A square or rectangular vector shape is drawn on the canvas to represent the body of a house.
A triangular vector shape is drawn and positioned on top of the house body to represent a roof.

task_completion.description: Draw a circular sun in the sky
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular vector shape is drawn, typically in the upper portion of the canvas, representing a sun.

task_completion.description: Use at least two different colors in the composition
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawn shapes (house body, roof, sun) display at least two distinct colors (e.g., a yellow sun and a red roof).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the final artwork to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, save dialog, or terminal command is visible saving the final image to '/home/ga/Documents/drawing_composition.png'.

integrity.description: The drawing was created inside the GCompris Vector Drawing interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing canvas and tools belong to GCompris. The agent did not use a different application like KolourPaint or Inkscape.

integrity.description: The drawing consists of basic vector shapes created manually
integrity.visual_evidence: The artwork looks like a simple composition of basic shapes (rectangles, triangles, circles) rather than a complex, pre-made clip art image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the created artwork rather than copying an existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the active creation of the drawing followed by a screenshot/save action, rather than just terminal commands copying or renaming an unrelated image file to the target path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the final screenshot is /home/ga/Documents/drawing_composition.png. The drawing must contain a house (square/rectangular body), a roof (triangular), and a sun (circular). At least 2 different colors must be used in the composition. The final file size should be at least 10 KB.
